title: canarium polyphyllum
intro: Canarium polyphyllum, also known as the Yellow Myrtle or Yellow Beech, is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Canarium polyphyllum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Canarium polyphyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
